ast.name: error
ast.target: 打开文件夹选择器时出错：

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 确定

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 取消

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Relative vault path to a template file. Only set this if you would like to export with a template (you don't need to.)
ast.target: 模板文件的相对保险库路径。仅当您希望使用模板导出时才设置此项（您无需设置）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault relative path of an existing folder in your vault. Exports will be written within that folder.
ast.target: 保险库中现有文件夹的相对路径。导出的内容将写入该文件夹内。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault relative path to a preamble.sty file in your vault. It will be included in the export.
ast.target: 保险库中 preamble.sty 文件的相对路径。它将被包含在导出中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to include display equations in lists, or stop the list and have the equation outside of the list.
ast.target: 是否在列表中包含显示公式，或者停止列表并将公式放在列表外部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Overwrite the preamble file also if a preamble file is found in the root of the vault.
ast.target: 如果在保险库根目录中找到 preamble 文件，则覆盖该文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Overwrite figure files in the Files folder during export.
ast.target: 导出时覆盖 Files 文件夹中的图片文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Overwrite the header file (header.tex) during export.
ast.target: 导出时覆盖头文件 (header.tex)。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use file names (without the file extension) as a default environment name.
ast.target: 使用文件名（不含文件扩展名）作为默认环境名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The last used external folder for exports. Updated automatically when exporting externally.
ast.target: 上次用于外部导出的文件夹。在外部导出时自动更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: That comments of the form %%...%% become latex comments. If false, the Obsidian comments are not included in the export.
ast.target: 启用后，%%...%% 形式的注释将变为 LaTeX 注释。如果禁用，Obsidian 注释将不会包含在导出中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, all warning messages from an export are automatically copied to the clipboard.
ast.target: 启用后，导出时的所有警告信息将自动复制到剪贴板。
